class.name: EditorDock
class.description:
EditorDock is a [Container] node that can be docked in one of the editor's dock slots. Docks are added by plugins to provide space for controls related to the plugin. You can add a dock by using [method EditorPlugin.add_dock]. The dock can be customized by changing its properties. [codeblock] extends EditorPlugin
# Dock reference. var dock
# Plugin initialization. func _enter_tree(): dock = EditorDock.new() dock.title = "My Dock" dock.dock_icon = load("./dock_icon.png") var dock_content = preload("./dock_content.tscn").instantiate() dock.add_child(dock_content) add_dock(dock, EditorPlugin.DOCK_SLOT_RIGHT_UL)
# Plugin clean-up. func _exit_tree(): remove_dock(dock) dock.queue_free() dock = null [/codeblock]

method.name: _load_layout_from_config
method.description: Implement this method to handle loading of this dock's layout. It's equivalent to [method EditorPlugin._set_window_layout]. [param section] is a unique section based on [member layout_key].

method.name: _save_layout_to_config
method.description: Implement this method to handle saving of this dock's layout. It's equivalent to [method EditorPlugin._get_window_layout]. [param section] is a unique section based on [member layout_key].

method.name: _update_layout
method.description: Implement this method to handle the layout switching for this dock. [param layout] is one of [enum DockLayout] constants. [codeblock] _update_layout(layout): box_container.vertical = (layout == DOCK_LAYOUT_VERTICAL) [/codeblock]

members.member: The available layouts for this dock, as a bitmask. If you want to make all layouts available, use [code]available_layouts = DOCK_LAYOUT_VERTICAL | DOCK_LAYOUT_HORIZONTAL[/code].
Default dock slot used when adding the dock with [method EditorPlugin.add_dock].
The icon for the dock. If specified, it will override [member icon_name].
The shortcut used to open the dock. This property can only be set before this dock is added via [method EditorPlugin.add_dock].

The icon name for the dock. It has to use an icon name from [code]EditorIcons[/code] theme type in the editor theme. You can find the list of available icons [url=https://godot-editor-icons.github.io/]here[/url].
The key representing this dock in the editor's layout file. If empty, dock's displayed name will be used instead.
Title of the dock's tab. If empty, the dock's [member Node.name] will be used. If the name is auto-generated (contains [code]@[/code]), first child's name will be used instead.

signal.name: tab_style_changed
signal.description: Emitted when the dock's tab style is supposed to change as a result of changing title or icon. The editor automatically handles this signal.

constants.constant: Allows placing the dock in the vertical dock slots on either sides of the editor. [b]Note:[/b] Currently this flag has no effect, because the bottom panel is not a proper dock slot. This means that the dock can always be vertical.
Allows placing the dock in the editor's bottom panel. Implement [method _update_layout] to handle changing layouts.
